visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with a vibrant expression stands centrally against a clean white studio background. He wears a checkered grey flat cap, round black-rimmed glasses, and a deep brown crewneck sweatshirt. He points dynamically toward the camera with his right index finger, moving his hands frequently to emphasize his points. He wears multiple beaded bracelets on his right wrist and a bright yellow-strapped watch on his left. The lighting is bright and even, emphasizing his facial features and the texture of his clothing. (2) The scene shifts to a vertical screen recording of an iOS smartphone interface displayed over a blurred background of the man. The menu navigation goes through the Settings app into the FaceTime sub-menu. A hand is partially visible at the bottom of the frame holding the physical device. A red arrow graphic appears to point out specific menu items, and large text overlays dominate the lower half of the frame. (3) The camera returns to a medium shot of the man in the original studio setting. He holds the smartphone in his left hand, looking directly into the lens with a warm and relieved smile. He waves his right hand in a friendly parting gesture. The background remains consistent with the previous phase, showing a plain, well-lit wall.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 更新iOS26. (2) [Subtitle]: 結果打FaceTime. (3) [Subtitle]: 花了5700塊錢. (4) [Subtitle]: 拿到了. [Subtitle]: 電話費的帳單. (5) [Subtitle]: 或者是. (6) [Subtitle]: 你從舊金山. [Subtitle]: 打回台灣. (7) [Subtitle]: 覺得好像. (8) [Subtitle]: FaceTime是用. (9) [Subtitle]: 網絡WiFi. (10) [Subtitle]: 結果沒想到. (11) [Subtitle]: 吃到你的. (12) [Subtitle]: 電話費怎麼辦. (13) [Subtitle]: 現在馬上. (14) [Subtitle]: 教你怎麼設. (15) [Subtitle]: 你到設定裡面. (16) [Subtitle]: 搜尋了. [Subtitle]: FaceTime以後. (17) [Subtitle]: 點到FaceTime. (18) [Subtitle]: 這裡呢. (19) [Subtitle]: 就有一個預設通話APP. (20) [Subtitle]: 你看我現在. (21) [Subtitle]: 是什麼. [Subtitle]: 行動網路通話. (22) [Subtitle]: 是不是慘了. (23) [Subtitle]: 點進來. (24) [Subtitle]: 切換到. (25) [Subtitle]: FaceTime. (26) [Subtitle]: 這個時候. (27) [Subtitle]: 才可以. (28) [Subtitle]: 萬無一失啊各位.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a checkered newsboy cap, glasses, a brown sweatshirt, and a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain white wall in a well-lit indoor studio environment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker delivers a high-arousal narration with a fast tempo and energetic pitch. The tone is authoritative and cautionary. There is a clean studio silence in the background with no music at first. Every phoneme is enunciated with high clarity. (2) A synthesized "whoosh" sound effect triggers as the content shifts. An upbeat electronic background music track begins, featuring a steady percussive beat and bright synth pads. The speaker continues his instructional delivery, maintaining high energy while explaining technical steps. (3) A sharp "ding" sound effect occurs, highlighting a specific action on the screen recording. The music continues at a steady volume, and the speaker's tone remains friendly and engaging. The interplay between the voice and the rhythmic music creates a sense of urgency. (4) A final "sparkle" chime sound effect plays as the speaker concludes his advice. His vocal valence peaks as he bids farewell. The background music maintains its tempo until the track is cut at the very end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to warn iPhone users about a specific FaceTime setting in iOS that might cause high cellular data charges and provides a step-by-step tutorial on how to change it to ensure calls are made over WiFi or the intended FaceTime audio service.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a classic social-media tutorial format with a clear problem-solution hook and high-density text overlays for readability.
